service.name: amoCRM API (Россия/СНГ)
service.description_for_ai: Самая популярная CRM-система в России и СНГ. Сделки, контакты, компании, воронка продаж. Интеграция с мессенджерами и телефонией. Используй для управления продажами, лидами, клиентской базой в России.

auth.how_to_get: Создать интеграцию в настройках аккаунта amoCRM

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM leads (сделки) from amoCRM pipeline. Filter by status, pipeline, responsible manager, and date ranges.

with.description: Related entities to include: contacts, companies, catalog_elements. Comma-separated.

filter[responsible_user_id].description: Filter by responsible manager user IDs

order[created_at].description: Sort by creation date: asc or desc

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new CRM deal (сделка) in amoCRM with name, budget, pipeline stage, responsible manager, and custom fields.

name.description: Deal/lead name — should describe the opportunity

price.description: Deal value/budget amount in account currency

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline ID to create deal in. Default pipeline if not specified.

responsible_user_id.description: Manager user ID to assign deal to

custom_fields_values.description: [{field_id: 123, values: [{value: 'Field value'}]}] for custom CRM fields

_embedded.description: {contacts: [{id: contact_id}], companies: [{id: company_id}]} to link contacts/companies

agent_hints.subdomain: Replace {subdomain} with your amoCRM subdomain e.g. mycompany.amocrm.ru
agent_hints.oauth: Use OAuth2 long-lived token from account settings. Refresh tokens expire in 3 months.
agent_hints.leads_vs_contacts: amoCRM uses Leads (сделки) for sales pipeline and Contacts for people. Link them via associations.
agent_hints.webhooks: Configure webhooks in account for real-time updates on lead/contact changes.
